execution_log.output: Container started, openEuler 24.03 LTS, x86_64, 16 cores, 15Gi memory

execution_log.command: dnf install -y gcc gcc-c++ make cmake python3 python3-pip wget tar gzip bzip2 git patch

execution_log.output: CMake configuration succeeded without CANN. FetchContent downloaded cann-cmake from gitcode.com/cann/cmake.git
execution_log.note: FATAL_ERROR checks for ASCEND_CANN_PACKAGE_PATH are commented out in cmake/config.cmake

execution_log.error: /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/tools/ccec_compiler/bin/ccec: No such file or directory; fatal error: hccl_types.h: No such file or directory; fatal error: dlog_pub.h: No such file or directory
execution_log.note: CANN Toolkit is a hard dependency: ccec compiler missing, hccl_types.h and dlog_pub.h headers missing

execution_log.output: Downloaded 1.5GB CANN Toolkit 9.1.0 (matching master branch version.cmake)
Build completed successfully. Generated cann-hccl_9.1.0_linux-x86_64.run (4.4MB). libhccl.so (13MB) produced.
execution_log.note: Full build with CANN 9.1.0 succeeded. All AIV kernel objects (.o), shared library (libhccl.so), compat library (libhccl_compat.so) built successfully. Package created via makeself.

execution_log.output: UT build succeeded. googletest 1.14.0 downloaded and built automatically. 1 test passed: UtPrepareEnv.hccl_prepare_ut_env (3013ms). Test runner script had minor issue trying to execute CMakeDirectoryInformation.cmake as binary.
execution_log.error: test runner script iterates over all 'executable' files including cmake-generated files
execution_log.note: The UT passed but the test runner has a bug where it finds cmake info files as 'executables'. Actual test result: 1 PASSED, 0 FAILED.

execution_log.output: all_reduce compiled successfully (23KB binary). Note: LD_LIBRARY_PATH needed at runtime as libraries are not in default search path.
execution_log.note: Example compiled but cannot execute without actual Ascend NPU hardware - requires npu-smi and Ascend driver

execution_log.output: HCCL package installed successfully, replaced CANN's built-in HCCL. New version takes effect immediately.

ut.note: Only 1 UT test exists in the current codebase (prepare_ut_env). The test runner script (build.sh run_ut) has a minor issue where it iterates over all executable files including cmake-generated files, but this does not affect the actual test result.

results.output_summary: Compilation succeeded. Cannot execute without Ascend NPU hardware (requires npu-smi, Ascend driver, and actual NPU device).
results.note: Example binary compiled but requires LD_LIBRARY_PATH at runtime and Ascend NPU hardware to execute

sample.note: All examples in the examples/ directory require Ascend NPU hardware to execute. Only compilation was verified.

documentation_gaps: CANN Toolkit download URL for master branch not explicitly provided in README - had to search the devcloud artifactory manually
CANN 8.5.0 download link provided in docs but master branch actually targets CANN 9.1.0 (per version.cmake). The version mismatch between docs (8.5.0) and code (9.1.0) is confusing.
No explicit mention that CANN Toolkit is a hard build dependency in the README's quick start section - only mentioned in the detailed build docs
Unit test documentation mentions 'bash build.sh --ut' but does not describe what tests exist or expected output
Examples require NPU hardware to run, but this is only briefly mentioned in the '上板测试' section without clear statement that examples cannot run without NPU
LD_LIBRARY_PATH requirement for running examples is not clearly documented

problems_encountered.problem: Git safe directory error when cloning cann-cmake submodule
Build failed without CANN Toolkit: ccec compiler not found, hccl_types.h and dlog_pub.h headers missing
problems_encountered.solution: Download and install CANN Toolkit 9.1.0 from https://ascend.devcloud.huaweicloud.com/artifactory/cann-run-mirror/software/master/20260528120328736/Ascend-cann-toolkit_9.1.0_linux-x86_64.run
problems_encountered.source: HCCL is fundamentally dependent on CANN software stack for compilation

problems_encountered.problem: CANN Toolkit download is 1.5GB, took ~16 minutes
problems_encountered.solution: Used the devcloud artifactory URL matching the master branch version

problems_encountered.problem: CANN Toolkit installation requires --quiet flag to skip EULA prompt
problems_encountered.solution: Used --quiet flag which accepts EULA automatically
problems_encountered.source: CANN Toolkit .run installer built on makeself

problems_encountered.problem: UT test runner script tries to execute CMakeDirectoryInformation.cmake as a binary
problems_encountered.solution: Not a critical issue - the actual test (hccl_ut_prepare_env) passed. The run_ut function in build.sh uses find -executable which catches cmake-generated files.
problems_encountered.source: build.sh run_ut() function iterates over all executable files in test directory

problems_encountered.problem: Example binary compiled but libhccl.so and libascendcl.so not found by ldd
problems_encountered.solution: Libraries exist at /usr/local/Ascend/cann-9.1.0/lib64/ but not in default linker search path. Requires LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/local/Ascend/cann/lib64 at runtime.
problems_encountered.source: Example Makefile does not set rpath

problems_encountered.problem: Example cannot execute without Ascend NPU hardware
problems_encountered.solution: N/A - this is expected. HCCL requires Ascend NPU for communication operations.

cann_version_compatibility_note: The HCCL master branch version.cmake specifies VERSION 9.1.0 and dependencies >= 8.5. The docs/zh/build/build.md mentions CANN 8.5.0 download link, but the master branch is actively developed against CANN 9.1.0. For master branch verification, CANN 9.1.0 should be used. CANN 8.5.0 may work due to forward compatibility mode (HCCL_CANN_COMPAT_850), but was not tested in this verification.
